'''Kira II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kira system/Legends|Kira system]], originally named '''Kira Prime''' by explorers from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]].

==Description==
Kira II was the only planet in the system that was habitable and suitable for colonization.<ref name="TSK" />

==History==
The planet was initially surveyed during the time of the Old Republic. It was the only planet in the system deemed worthy of further developement, as all others were classified as uninhabitable.<ref name="TSK" />

When Republic explorers returned to the system years later, they found the three inner planets had been mysteriously destroyed, and gave the name [[Kira Prime]] to the [[asteroid field]] orbiting [[Kira's sun|Kira]].<ref name="TSK" />

When the [[Kira Run]] was established years later, the asteroids remained a small, but constant hazard for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.<ref name="TSK" />

==Sources==
